name: feedback-honeypot
_note: Public. Honeypot drop path: a non-empty `website` triggers a silent 201 with the distinct body { id:null, message:'Received. Thanks!' } AFTER the ValidationPipe passes (kind/description/source all valid) but BEFORE any DB write — no row inserted, mutates nothing. Fully deterministic. Both Node and Go must return 201 + this exact body.
